response.overview: Japan is a football team. Messi, the captain, top scorer and striker, is in love with Esmeralda, whom he wishes to marry... Borgez, the team’s defender, is a poet in search of the love of his dreams... Lacone, a player who covers the whole field, a singer and tireless traveler in pursuit of a thriving freedom... Raúl, the goalkeeper, a football lover and the team’s grill master.  Japan is a team of friends. The stories of these players intertwine in this plot, only to meet again on the green grass of a football pitch. They are about to face their archrival: Soap. It is the great final match.
response.title: Japón, el tiempo es ahora
